recommendations.title: Werner: Eat My Dust!!!
recommendations.overview: Because of a bet, Werner and his friend have to construct the fastest vehicle to win a race, because life depends on it.

recommendations.title: Werner and the Wizard of Booze
recommendations.overview: Comic artist Brösel trades a magic pen that helps him come up with funny stories for the promise to fulfill one of Rumpelstiltskin's wishes. The resulting animated films show episodes of the life of Werner, a plumber apprentice and motorbike enthusia

recommendations.title: Killing Cabos
recommendations.overview: Two young men get involved with some criminals while trying to free the tycoon they kidnapped.

recommendations.title: The Gilded Cage
recommendations.overview: In the beautiful area of ​​Paris, Maria and José Ribeiro lived for almost thirty years on the ground floor of a Haussmann building, in their dear little lodge.

recommendations.title: Tremors
recommendations.overview: Val McKee and Earl Bassett are in a fight for their lives when they discover that their desolate town has been infested with gigantic, man-eating creatures that live below the ground.

recommendations.title: Lo and Behold: Reveries of the Connected World
recommendations.overview: Werner Herzog's exploration of the Internet and the connected world.

recommendations.title: An All Dogs Christmas Carol
recommendations.overview: Charlie, Itchy and Sasha itch and scratch their way through everything and anything in an effort to save Christmas from the wicked hellhound Belladonna, who wants to use dogs from all over the world to ruin Christmas.

recommendations.title: The Simpsons Movie
recommendations.overview: After Homer accidentally pollutes the town's water supply, Springfield is encased in a gigantic dome by the EPA and the Simpsons are declared fugitives.

recommendations.title: My Best Fiend
recommendations.overview: A film that describes the love-hate relationship between Werner Herzog and Klaus Kinski, the deep trust between the director and the actor, and their independently and simultaneously hatched plans to murder one another.

recommendations.title: Into the Inferno
recommendations.overview: With stunning views of eruptions and lava flows, Werner Herzog captures the raw power of volcanoes and their ties to indigenous spiritual practices.
